title: Public service pensions remedy newsletter — June 2025
body: "This newsletter is published by HMRC’s Pension Schemes Services to update stakeholders on the latest news on the public service pensions remedy. This newsletter has articles on:   Event Reports for the tax year 2024 to 2025 The Public Service Pension Schemes (Rectification of Unlawful Discrimination) (Tax) Regulations 2025  "
